category_sources: Official Monit manual describes Monit as a utility for monitoring services on Unix systems.
source_facts.description says Monit manages and monitors processes, files, directories, and devices.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is monit; official Monit manual and homepage use the display name Monit.
docs_sources: Official Monit homepage links to the current Monit manual and Monit wiki documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Monit homepage links its code repository to tildeslash/monit on Bitbucket.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies monitoring and management of processes/files/devices; official manual adds service monitoring and Unix system context.
